data.title: bd-2ec6: fix(hooks): allow --mention with --ttl/--claim-owner
data.description:
## Summary
Allows combining --mention with --ttl and --claim-owner flags in bus hooks add. This enables mention-based hooks to acquire claims to prevent duplicate spawns.

## Changes
- Modified src/cli/hooks.rs to support claim_release for MentionReceived hooks
- Added auto-derived claim pattern respond://<agent> for mention hooks
- Uses atomic check-and-stake to prevent race conditions
- Updated CLI help text in src/cli/mod.rs

## Security Review Requested
- Claim acquisition logic
- Race condition handling
